features: Daily cleanse: This Clean & Clear face cleanser has been specially formulated to deeply cleanse sensitive skin's everyday build-up of oil, dirt, and grease that cannot always be removed by water
Oil-fighting formula: The purifying Salicylic Acid in this clean and clear cleanser helps dissolve dirt and dead skin cells that can block pores and cause breakouts, allowing for gentle exfoliation
Prevents breakouts: The Salicylic Acid cleanser helps prevent spots and breakouts in one simple step, and can be used to refresh, tone, and reduce the appearance of visible pores
Application instructions: Apply the Clean & Clear face cleanser for sensitive skin on a cotton pad and wipe over your face and neck avoiding the eye area, with no need to rinse
Product details: Clean and Clear cleanser for sensitive skin (1x 200ml bottle), face cleanser with Salicylic Acid developed to deeply cleanse sensitive skin and help prevent breakouts
description: Product Description Clean & Clear Deep Cleansing Lotion - A daily essential for sensitive skin Clean & Clear Deep Cleansing Lotion for Sensitive Skin cleanses your skin to help prevent spots in one simple step! The facial cleanser gently removes everyday build-up of oil, dirt, and grease that cannot always be removed by water. Formulated with Salicylic Acid, a proven spot-fighting ingredient that helps dissolve the dirt and dead skin cells that can block pores and cause breakouts. The Salicylic Acid cleanser can also be used to refresh, tone, and tighten the appearance of pores after washing. How to use: Apply cleansing lotion to a cotton pad and wipe over the face and neck as often as required. No need to rinse. Use daily as part of your Clean & Clear routine for skin that's really clean, clear, and under control. The Product Benefits at a Glance: Deeply cleanses and removes dirt Helps prevent breakouts and spots Refreshes and tones the skin Suitable for sensitive skin 1x 200ml bottle Ingredients Aqua, Alcohol Denat., Salicylic Acid, Camphor, Eucalyptus Globulus Leaf Oil, Mentha Piperita, Benzoic Acid, Parfum, Limonene, CI 42090 Directions Directions: Apply cleansing lotion to a cotton pad and wipe over face and neck as often as required. No need to rinse. Use daily as part of your Clean & Clear® routine for skin that's really clean, clear and under control. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If contact occurs, immediately flush with water. Discontinue use if skin irritation develops. Keep out of reach of children. Box Contains 1x 200 ml Cleansing Lotion Manufacturer Contact Information GB: Kenvue UK Ltd High Wycombe HP12 4EG UK IE: Kenvue France Campus de Maigremont Chaussée du Vexin 27100 Val-de-Reuil France Questions? www.kenvuecontact.com See more
